steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Waf Rate Bot Boundary · Theory Waf Rate Bot Boundary
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 3051 during a regional recovery and budget exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to exhaustively evaluate application, WAF, origin, header, and private-error controls; separate deterministic browser evidence from controlled Node and AWS transfer gates; then double concurrent Upload instances and preserve aggregate memory and worker budgets. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
